title: [release-1.37] Properly validate cache IDs and sources
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #5778

/assign nalind

```release-note
Fixed CVE-2024-9675 which allowed arbitrary paths from the host to be mounted into a build container using the `--mount type=cache` argument to the `RUN` instruction in Dockerfiles.
```

comments.body:
/approve
/lgtm

I don't think we need to worry about the commit message.
